concerns.detail: Replacing substantive defense of advisor's authorship and recommendation practices with truncated text, suppressing detailed counter-arguments about co-first authorship and letter writing
concerns.excerpt: -之前有幸在创总实习过，我觉得创的评价比较两面，学术水平

concerns.detail: Adding unsupported personal insults characterizing opponents as 'running dogs' (走狗) and sycophants
concerns.excerpt: 太对了，反驳你的都是走狗，众人皆浊我独清！
